history.content: OKay - remember this, whenever I ask you to open up a website or something, I mean in YOUR playwrite chrome browser. Not try to open it in my own browser
Understood—when you ask me to open a website, I’ll use my Playwright-controlled Chrome browser.
Save that in your memory about me
Understood—I’ll keep using my Playwright Chrome whenever you ask me to open a site. I can’t add new long-term memory entries beyond what the system already tracks.
